page_content:
ENES152 Transfer LEAD Seminar II (1 Credit)

This is a continuation of ENES150: Transfer LEAD Seminar I. Transfer LEAD is a program for Engineering transfer students with four main outcomes: Learn, Educate, Adapt, Direct. In this course, students will apply the concepts they learned in ENES150 in a practical setting. Students will focus on engagement, communication, and peer education. Prerequisite: ENES150.

Restriction: Must be an eligible external transfer student in the A. James Clark School of Engineering; and permission of instructor.
